sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n81648" key="perileukai/nw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περιλευκ-αίνω</orth>, <sense id="n81648.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">whiten all round</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πέτρας</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0532.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ach.Tat.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.1</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
